feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain are possible, and accumulations may approach warning criteria. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Area extended a bit further north. South of Hikurangi upgraded to warning.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 100 to 140 mm of rain. Intensities of 15 to 25 mm per hour are likely and there is a chance of downpours of 25 to 40 mm per hour which may or may not be associated with thunderstorms. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Low. Changes: Upgraded to Warning (Orange).

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 80 to 120 mm of rain, especially north of Cape Rodney. Intensities of 15 to 25 mm per hour are likely and there is a chance of downpours of 25 to 40 mm per hour, which may or may not be accompanied by thunderstorms. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Low. Changes: Upgraded to Warning (Orange).

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 80 to 120 mm of rain. Intensities of 15 to 25 mm per hour are likely, but there is a chance of downpours of 25 to 40 mm per hour which may or may not be accompanied by thunderstorms. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Low. Changes: Upgraded to Warning (Orange).

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain are possible, and accumulations may approach warning criteria. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Low. Changes: The threat of heavy rain over the Coromandel Peninsula has reduced, and the Watch is only being maintained for north of Whitianga with a low risk of upgrade.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
